Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Thomas Ray, Esq. and Robert Russell appeared for Plaintiff; Joe Torres was also present. Joe Torres was sworn and testified for Plaintiff. After presentation of evidence and argument of counsel, the Court awarded judgment to Plaintiff and against Defendant Peter Lynn in the sum of %57,141.97. See scanned document. Judge: Diane Wick; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Candace Yount. (D. 611)
